loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue training your mind.
registerSubtitle: Start training your mind for free.
usernameFormat: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
registerFailed: Could not create your account. Please check your details and try again.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
resetLinkSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.
passwordResetDone: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
resetLinkInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
